item.title: Robots, already in hospitals, are ready to roll in other industries
item.description: In the years to come, robots will help offset worker shortages in health care, manufacturing and other industries, experts say.

item.title: Watch Live: Rev. Jesse Jackson funeral services at House of Hope
item.description: The People's Celebration, the public funeral service for Rev. Jesse Jackson, Sr., is being held at House of Hope on the far South Side of Chicago.

item.title: Trump demands "unconditional surrender" as Russia gives Iran intel on U.S. positions
item.description: With the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran in its seventh day, President Trump says the aim is to bring Iran back from the brink of destruction and "Make Iran ...

item.title: Watch: Obama honors Rev. Jesse Jackson's life and impact at his funeral
item.description: Former President Barack Obama spoke at the funeral of civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson on Friday. Obama remembered Jackson as a man with "immense ...

item.title: These 10 jobs are most exposed to AI, Anthropic finds
item.description: The maker of the Claude chatbot says its research could help identify economic disruptions by measuring how AI is currently reshaping work.
